title: rubus × ithytrichus
intro: Rubus × ithytrichus, also known as Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a hybrid of the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the Himalayan raspberry (Rubus ellipticus). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus × ithytrichus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce blood pressure, and help manage diabetes. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
